backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the AI recruitment platform, defining data types (jobs, candidates, interviews, offers) and CRUD/query endpoints with role-based access control via a prefab authorization mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented frontend features (dashboard, jobs, candidates, pipeline, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing short summaries of the Offers page and OfferForm component, describing their roles in displaying and managing offer letters.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'AI Recruit Pro', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, handles Internet Identity authentication gating, and renders a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/components/AIScoreBadge.tsx: Reusable badge component that displays an AI match score percentage with color-coded styling and an optional progress bar based on score thresholds.
Slide-over panel component showing a candidate's full profile including contact info, skills, AI match scores, pipeline stage history, and linked interviews.
frontend/src/components/CandidateForm.ts: A slide-out Sheet form component for creating or editing a candidate, with fields for name, email, phone, resume, skills, and experience years, plus AI-powered resume parsing via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: A floating chatbot widget that answers FAQ questions about the hiring process using keyword-based intent matching, and can fetch and display live open job listings.
frontend/src/components/InterviewForm.ts: A Dialog form component for scheduling or editing an interview, capturing candidate, job, date/time, interviewer, type, status, and notes fields with create/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/JobForm.tsx: A slide-out Sheet form component for creating or editing a job requisition, with fields for title, department, location, job type, description, required skills, and experience level.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application shell providing a responsive sidebar navigation with links to all major pages, user profile display, logout functionality, and an embedded ChatbotWidget.
frontend/src/components/OfferForm.tsx: A dialog form component for creating offer letters and viewing/updating their status (pending, accepted, declined), using React state and custom query hooks for mutations and data fetching.
frontend/src/components/TemplateForm.tsx: A dialog form component for creating and editing communication templates, supporting placeholder insertion, a live preview tab with sample data substitution, and category selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, and exposing identity state and status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the application, exporting typed queries and mutations for user profiles, jobs, candidates, interviews, templates, offer letters, and analytics against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including color tokens, sidebar variables, and utility classes for gradients and glass effects.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Displays recruitment analytics dashboard with summary cards, a bar chart of top jobs by application volume, a pie chart of candidate pipeline stages, and a line chart of applications over the last 30 days using Recharts.
frontend/src/pages/Candidates.tsx: Renders a searchable, filterable list of candidates with status badges, AI match scores, and actions for creating, editing, deleting, and calculating match scores via dropdown menus and dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Shows a high-level recruitment overview with metric cards, a pipeline stage bar chart, and a top-scoring candidates list, with navigation shortcuts to other sections.
frontend/src/pages/Interviews.tsx: Manages interview scheduling with list and calendar views, aggregating interviews across all candidates, and supporting status updates (complete/cancel) and editing via a form modal.
frontend/src/pages/Jobs.tsx: Displays job requisitions with search, status, and department filters, and supports creating, editing, deleting, and updating job statuses through dropdown menus and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: React page for managing offer letters, displaying all candidates' offers with status badges, and supporting create/delete operations via a form dialog and confirmation alert.
frontend/src/pages/Pipeline.tsx: Kanban-style recruitment pipeline page that groups candidates by hiring stage, supports drag-and-drop stage transitions, job filtering, and a move-with-note dialog.
frontend/src/pages/Templates.tsx: Page for managing communication templates with search, category filtering, and CRUD operations (create, edit, delete) via a form dialog and confirmation alert.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL/hash query parameters, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color palettes (teal, amber, slate), border radii, shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for HireIQ, an AI-powered recruitment platform, including version, architectural notes, image requirements, and a list of existing implemented features with their requirement IDs.
